description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden chest with a rounded, barrel-like lid that opens upward. The exterior is predominantly a reddish-brown wood with visible grain and weathering, accented by thick, metallic silver bands at both ends of the lid and along the edges. The lid is hinged at the back, allowing it to open and reveal a spacious, hollow interior suitable for storage. The base is solid and slightly flared, providing stability and a classic, robust appearance. The chest has no visible handles or external markings, giving it a utilitarian yet sturdy look. Its construction and materials suggest it is designed for durability and secure storage in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, reddish-brown wooden chest with a rounded, silver-banded lid and a spacious, openable interior. The design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for secure storage.
description_view_0: Front view of the closed chest, showing the rounded lid with metallic bands and the solid, rectangular base.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid partially open, revealing the thickness of the lid and the depth of the interior compartment.
description_view_2: Direct view of the open chest, clearly displaying the hollow interior and the full opening of the lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid open, highlighting the curvature of the lid and the reinforced edges.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at lid ends and edges
